version_description: Based on his Abbey Road Sessions, 2024.
tuning: Eb Ab Db Gb Bb Eb
content:
[Chords]
[ch]Em[/ch]         x7x050
[ch]Dadd4add9[/ch]  x54030
[ch]Cmaj7[/ch]      x32000
[ch]G6[/ch]         320000
[ch]Am[/ch]         x02210

[Intro]
|     [ch]Em[/ch]     |  [ch]Dadd4add9[/ch]  |    [ch]Cmaj7[/ch]   |   [ch]Am[/ch]   [ch]G6[/ch]   |
|     [ch]Em[/ch]     |  [ch]Dadd4add9[/ch]  |    [ch]Cmaj7[/ch]   |   [ch]G6[/ch]   [ch]Am[/ch]   |

[Verse]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]                 [ch]Dadd4add9[/ch]                        [ch]Cmaj7[/ch]
Don't know where you at, don't know where you've been[/tab]
[tab]                     [ch]Am[/ch]                  [ch]G6[/ch]
Don't know nothin' 'bout that boy you're into[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]                 [ch]Dadd4add9[/ch]                  [ch]Cmaj7[/ch]
Don't feel bad for you, but I feel bad for him[/tab]
[tab]                     [ch]G6[/ch]              [ch]Am[/ch]
And all the hell you gon' be puttin' him through[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]                        [ch]Dadd4add9[/ch]       [ch]Cmaj7[/ch]
Probably tell him we're a burnt out flame[/tab]
[tab]                         [ch]Am[/ch]         [ch]G6[/ch]      [ch]Em[/ch]
Probably tell him that I ain't been on your mind[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]                      [ch]Dadd4add9[/ch]
How I ain't nothin' but a long gone thing[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]Cmaj7[/ch]              [ch]Am[/ch]   [ch]G6[/ch]
You can cuss my name, but baby, don't you lie[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]                            [ch]Dadd4add9[/ch]                        [ch]Cmaj7[/ch]
When you're tastin' what he's drinkin', are you thinkin' 'bout me?[/tab]
[tab]                              [ch]Am[/ch]               [ch]G6[/ch]         [ch]Em[/ch]
When you're ridin' where he's drivin', are you missin' my street?[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]                        [ch]Dadd4add9[/ch]
Every time you close your eyes, tell me, who do you see?[/tab]
[tab][ch]Cmaj7[/ch]                         [ch]G6[/ch]                [ch]Am[/ch]            [ch]Em[/ch]
When you're tastin' what he's drinkin', are you thinkin' bout me?[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]          [ch]Dadd4add9[/ch]                        [ch]Cmaj7[/ch]
Comin' over tonight, wish that truck in your drive was mine[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]Am[/ch]                 [ch]G6[/ch]          [ch]Em[/ch]
Just like you know it's supposed to be[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]                    [ch]Dadd4add9[/ch]            [ch]Cmaj7[/ch]
When you're up in his bed, am I up in your head?[/tab]
[tab]                           [ch]G6[/ch]             [ch]Am[/ch]            [ch]Em[/ch]
Making you crazy, tell me, baby, are you thinkin' 'bout me?[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]                 [ch]Dadd4add9[/ch]                [ch]Cmaj7[/ch]
Are you thinkin' 'bout, are you thinkin' 'bout[/tab]
[tab]                              [ch]Am[/ch]                 [ch]G6[/ch]            [ch]Em[/ch]
When you're tastin' what he's drinkin', are you thinkin' 'bout me?[/tab]

[Verse]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]               [ch]Dadd4add9[/ch]                 [ch]Cmaj7[/ch]
Do you hide your phone? Did you change my name?[/tab]
[tab]                 [ch]Am[/ch]        [ch]G6[/ch]    [ch]Em[/ch]
When he wants to go to our go-to place[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]                 [ch]Dadd4add9[/ch]                [ch]Cmaj7[/ch]
Do you tell him he can't? Then go out of your way[/tab]
[tab]                      [ch]G6[/ch]          [ch]Am[/ch]
To be somewhere, any damn where I ain't[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]                            [ch]Dadd4add9[/ch]                        [ch]Cmaj7[/ch]
When you're tastin' what he's drinkin', are you thinkin' 'bout me?[/tab]
[tab]                              [ch]Am[/ch]               [ch]G6[/ch]         [ch]Em[/ch]
When you're ridin' where he's drivin', are you missin' my street?[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]                        [ch]Dadd4add9[/ch]
Every time you close your eyes, tell me, who do you see?[/tab]
[tab][ch]Cmaj7[/ch]                         [ch]G6[/ch]                [ch]Am[/ch]            [ch]Em[/ch]
When you're tastin' what he's drinkin', are you thinkin' bout me?[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]          [ch]Dadd4add9[/ch]                        [ch]Cmaj7[/ch]
Comin' over tonight, wish that truck in your drive was mine[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]Am[/ch]                 [ch]G6[/ch]          [ch]Em[/ch]
Just like you know it's supposed to be[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]                    [ch]Dadd4add9[/ch]            [ch]Cmaj7[/ch]
When you're up in his bed, am I up in your head?[/tab]
[tab]                           [ch]G6[/ch]             [ch]Am[/ch]            [ch]Em[/ch]
Making you crazy, tell me, baby, are you thinkin' 'bout me?[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]                 [ch]Dadd4add9[/ch]                [ch]Cmaj7[/ch]
Are you thinkin' 'bout, are you thinkin' 'bout[/tab]
[tab]                              [ch]Am[/ch]                 [ch]G6[/ch]            [ch]Em[/ch]
When you're tastin' what he's drinkin', are you thinkin' 'bout me?[/tab]

[Bridge]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]               [ch]Dadd4add9[/ch]
Don't know where you at[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]Cmaj7[/ch]                  [ch]Am[/ch] [ch]G6[/ch]
Girl, I know where you oughta be[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]                            [ch]Dadd4add9[/ch]                        [ch]Cmaj7[/ch]

[tab][ch]Em[/ch]                    [ch]Dadd4add9[/ch]            [ch]Cmaj7[/ch]

[tab]                           [ch]G6[/ch]             [ch]Am[/ch]            [ch]Em[/ch]
Making you crazy, tell me, baby, are you thinkin' 'bout me?[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]                 [ch]Dadd4add9[/ch]                [ch]Cmaj7[/ch]
Are you thinkin' 'bout, are you thinkin' 'bout[/tab]
